steps.assistant_content_head: I'll now examine the rendered image to verify that all requirements are met:

The comparison table now meets all the specified requirements:

1. Header: The header has a gradient background from #1a1a4e to #3730a3 with centered white text "Choose Your Plan" in 36px font.

2. Table Structure: The table displays 3 columns (Basic, Pro, Enterprise) and 9 rows (1 header row + 8 feature rows) at desktop (1920px).

3. Pro Column: The Pro column has a subtle box-shadow: 0 8px 24px
